case_title: HUSK, ERIC L. VS MD & J PROPERTIES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MD & J PROPERTIES
PLTF'S DECLARATION AMENDED TO COMPLAINT. AMENDING THE AMOUNT FROM $2,000 TO $6,500.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUSK, ERIC L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MD & J PROPERTIES $3,587.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,692.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $1500 FOR PLAINTIFF'S PORTION OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT; $87 ACCRUED INTEREST FOR THE ENTIRE TERM OF HIS TENANCY; AND $2000 FOR PENALTIES PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1950.5. DEFENDANT CREDIT SHALL BE GIVEN AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR ANY PRIOR PAYMENTS, OR INTEREST BY DEFT ON THE PREDECESSOR LANDLORD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-13-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-01-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUE TO 5/1/07 AT 3:30 P.M.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY HUSK, ERIC L. AS TO DEFENDANT MD & J PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MARGUERITE MURPHY (MD&J PROPERTIES) SUBMITTED A LETTER STATING SHE IS IN IRELAND UNTIL 7/20/07. COURT TO PROVIDE COPY TO PLTF AT TIME OF HEARING.
